headline: Technological Investments & Acquisitions Aid Aptiv Amid Rising Costs
summary: APTV rides on electrification and smart mobility trends. Rising costs, weak demand and competition challenge its growth outlook.

headline: Companies can’t offset rising customer service tech costs with staff cuts, Gartner finds
summary: Automation can’t replace human agents without the risk of operational disruption and a worse customer experience, the firm says.

headline: NiCE is the Only Vendor Named a Gartner Customers’ Choice in Voice of the Customer for Contact Center as a Service Report
summary: HOBOKEN, N.J., April 06, 2026--NiCE (Nasdaq: NICE) today announced that once again it was the only vendor named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Contact Center as a Service (CCaaS report). This is the third time NiCE has been recognized as a Customers’ Choice.

headline: CrowdStrike Named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Managed Detection and Response Report
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, April 06, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced it has been recognized as a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Managed Detection and Response (MDR) report.
